## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue (Fixes #… or Refs #…)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `shellcheck install.sh` clean
- [ ] Tested `install.sh`, `--update`, `--uninstall` with and without `--prefix`
- [ ] New/changed SKILL.md files: valid frontmatter, cross-refs use `/skill-name` form
